headline: Is Williams Sonoma (WSM) Still Attractive After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Williams-Sonoma at around US$180 a share is still a fair deal or starting to look stretched, this article will walk you through what the current price might be saying about value. The stock has been relatively flat over the last week with a 0.2% decline, while the past month shows a 9.7% decline and the past year shows a 31.8% gain, so recent moves look quite different depending on your timeframe. Recent attention on the stock has focused on its long term track...
